sentiment: Every craft deserves the weight of full attention.

stories.title: Domain expertise has always been the real moat
stories.summary: The old lesson keeps returning: deep judgment is not decorative, it is the thing that lets tools become useful.

stories.title: Avian Visitors
stories.summary: A balcony microphone listening for passing birds turns attention into a small, patient instrument.

stories.title: Ahoy, DECmate II the little PDP-8 that could
stories.summary: An old machine still humming reminds us that durable craft survives by being understood, repaired, and cared for.
